---
title: "Assimilation of Hispanics and Arabs in America"
date: 2025-06-01
author:
  - name: Augustine Denteh
    affiliation: ""
  - name: Hussain Hadah
    url: https://www.hussainhadah.com/
    affiliation: Northwestern University
categories:
  - Identity
  - Race
  - Ethnicity
  - Immigration
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    Augustine Denteh and <strong>Hussain Hadah</strong>. "Assimilation of Hispanics and Arabs in America."
  extra: >-
    Using restricted-access census data with the RDC.
pub-status:
  status: In Progress
  class: warning
  icon: fa-solid fa-pencil
---
